data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. IT'S SOYSAGES looks close to win after hitting the frame last run (22.63) at this track in a Grade 5. Has first look at box 2 this time. Deserves serious consideration. 7. MUSTANG ELEANOR has a strong winning strike-rate over this track and trip with three wins and a placing from eight tries. Was out of the placings last time (22.71) at this track in a T3 RSTW, finishing sixth and beaten 5 lengths. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts. 1. YELLOW OCHRE finds it hard to break through. Has finished in the placings two on end now, the latest when third (22.77) at this track. Solid record here at the distance winning four races. Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Will give a great sight again. 6. PAW MURBELLA is building a solid run wins and will play a big role again.","runners":[2,7,1,6],"exclusive":false}
